en_title: Zelda Fan Ditches Ocarina of Time Unreal Engine Remake After a Decade of Work
cn_title: 《塞尔达》《Unreal Engine》《时之笛》粉丝重制项目十年心血终告弃坑
subtitle: 怕被任天堂忍者盯上？
opus_summary: CryZENx因任天堂官宣Switch 2版《时之笛》，终止十年Unreal粉丝重制，自称怕「任天堂忍者」。其Patreon月费4美元(约合人民币27元)(约27元)，或将重制其他游戏。

paragraphs.en: A talented Nintendo fan has ditched their attempt to recreate The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time in Unreal Engine after a decade of work, following the announcement of the game's upcoming Switch 2 remake.
paragraphs.cn: 一位才华横溢的任天堂粉丝，在任天堂宣布《塞尔达传说 时之笛》将登陆Switch 2重制后，放弃了他历时十年、在Unreal Engine中重制该游戏的尝试。

paragraphs.en: YouTuber CryZENx has been working on an unofficial PC version of Nintendo's N64 classic since at least 2016, and been charting the project's progress via dozens of YouTube videos along the way. There's even a playable demo to try, which has somehow avoided Nintendo's legal gaze.
paragraphs.cn: 油管主CryZENx至少从2016年起就在制作这款任天堂N64经典的非官方PC版，并通过数十个YouTube视频持续记录项目进展。甚至还出现了一个可玩Demo，不知何故一直未被任天堂法务部门盯上。

paragraphs.en: While Nintendo still hasn't intervened to shut down the project — as it has done with other similar attempts in the past — CryZENx has now pre-emptively pulled the plug.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管任天堂至今没有像过去对待其他类似项目那样出手叫停，但CryZENx还是主动拔掉了插头。

paragraphs.en: "I'm sorry that I had to disappoint," CryZENx wrote in an update on Patreon about his unfinished work. "It's better to just stop the project for now or I would been dissapeared... because of Nintendo ninjas."
paragraphs.cn: CryZENx在Patreon上关于他未完成作品的更新中写道：「很抱歉我不得不让大家失望。现在最好先停掉这个项目，否则我可能会消失……因为任天堂忍者。」

paragraphs.en: CryZENx believes the added interest in Nintendo's own Switch 2 version of Ocarina would naturally have increased attention on the fan project, potentially prompting Nintendo to threaten removal of all its associated YouTube videos — or even more dire legal implications. The Switch 2 remake's existence also removes reason for the Unreal Engine version to exist, as fans will have a shiny new official version of the game to play.
paragraphs.cn: CryZENx认为，任天堂自家Switch 2版《时之笛》带来的额外关注自然会增加粉丝项目的曝光度，可能促使任天堂威胁删除所有相关YouTube视频，甚至引发更严重的法律后果。Switch 2重制版的存在，也让Unreal Engine版本没了存在的理由，毕竟玩家们将能玩到焕然一新的官方版本。

paragraphs.en: That said, CryZENx's statement may still attract Nintendo's attention — especially as the YouTuber is now polling fans over which other retro games should be remade in Unreal Engine next, such as Zelda: Twilight Princess, Minish Cap, Donkey Kong 64, and Metroid Prime Hunters.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，CryZENx的声明可能仍会引起任天堂的注意——尤其是这位油管主现在正让粉丝投票，决定接下来该用Unreal Engine重制哪些经典游戏，例如《塞尔达传说 黄昏公主》《缩小帽》《大金刚64》和《密特罗德 猎人》。

paragraphs.en: Like many fan creators, CryZENx does not charge directly for access to the project, but instead runs a Patreon account where money can be pledged to offer general support. For $4 a month, followers get access to Patreon updates, behind-the-scenes content and downloads, with various tier options offered up to a pricey $127 option that offers private Discord calls.
paragraphs.cn: 像许多同人创作者一样，CryZENx并不直接对项目内容收费，而是运营着一个Patreon账户，供玩家捐款以提供一般性支持。每月支付4美元(约合人民币27元)，粉丝就能获取Patreon更新、幕后内容和下载权限，还有各种不同档位可选，最高为127美元(约合人民币861元)档，可提供私人Discord通话。

paragraphs.en: "I would like to tell you that Ocarina of time Project is officially stopped," CryZENx wrote. "What would you want see on YouTube? A very last video of my Project with Full gameplay of Chapter 2/3 for the very last video for the OOT project? Please let me know. Also thanks so much to all the long supporters, you have been supporting me like a decade. I owe you alot... also thanks to all the newcomers that came in since the Nintendo announcement... you are a true hero THANK YOU! Also I hope you wont quit the sub <3."
paragraphs.cn: CryZENx写道：「我想告诉大家，《时之笛》项目已正式停止。你们想在YouTube上看到什么？作为OOT项目的最后一个视频，我录制了第二章/第三章的完整实机演示作为最终视频？请告诉我。还要非常感谢所有长期支持者，你们已经像十年如一日地支持我。我欠你们很多……也感谢任天堂公布以来新加入的朋友……你们是真正的英雄，谢谢！也希望你们不要取消订阅<3。」

paragraphs.en: After a major leak and much fan speculation, Nintendo finally confirmed it was remaking Ocarina of Time during this month's major Nintendo Direct . An initial teaser revealed little, though showed the game's 3D art style and confirmed it will launch sometime later in 2026. However, a now-removed product description has hinted that the game will likely be a faithful remake .
paragraphs.cn: 经过大规模泄露和粉丝的诸多猜测后，任天堂终于在本月的大型直面会上确认正在重制《时之笛》。首个预告片透露的信息有限，仅展示了游戏的3D美术风格，并确认将于2026年晚些时候发售。不过，一份现已删除的产品描述暗示，这很可能是一款忠实还原的重制版。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
